text: Cyclic molecular frameworks, a.k.a. benzannulated medium-sized and macrocyclic ring (BMR) systems, are a fundamental unit of organic chemistry and are part of many significant bioactive molecules such as complex natural products and synthetically derived small molecule pharmaceuticals.
